description_long: This is a life-sized bust of a man mounted atop a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The bust is sculpted in a realistic style, depicting the head and upper torso of a male figure with detailed facial features and short hair. The pedestal is made of light-colored stone or concrete, with visible weathering and a vertical crack running down the front. There is an inscription on the front face of the pedestal, which appears to include a name and possibly a date, though the text is partially obscured. The sculpture is set on a square base covered with grass and patches of dirt, suggesting an outdoor installation. The overall appearance is solemn and commemorative, typical of monuments found in public parks or plazas.
description: A realistic male bust on a tall, weathered stone pedestal with an inscription, set on a grassy square base. The sculpture has a commemorative and solemn appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed male bust, the inscription on the pedestal, and the cracked stone surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the smooth, unadorned side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bust and the plain, vertical surface of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bust's profile and the pedestal's side, with visible weathering and grass at the base.
attribute_subject_matter: realistic male human bust on a pedestal
attribute_location_context: outdoor area with grass and dirt, likely a park or public plaza
